nasb.text: Gomer with all its troops; Beth-togarmah from the remote parts of the north with all its troops—many peoples with you.

esv.text: Gomer and all his hordes; Beth-togarmah from the uttermost parts of the north with all his hordes—many peoples are with you.

cnv.text: 又有歌篾人和他們的全軍，北方極處的陀迦瑪族和他們的全軍，這許多民族都與你在一起。

ccb.text: 还有歌篾的军队和从遥远的北方来的陀迦玛军队。许多国家的军队都与你在一起。
